title: Evaluating sentiment analysis models: A comparative analysis of vaccination tweets during the COVID-19 phase leveraging DistilBERT for enhanced insights
author: Agrawal, Majumder, et al.

steps.title: Methodology
steps.instruction: The dataset used in this study, vaccination_tweets.csv, was sourced from Kaggle and comprises 10,933 tweets with 19 columns for each tweet. Fig. 1 shows Graphical Abstract for Proposed Methodology.Fig. 1Graphical abstract of proposed methodology.Fig 1

steps.title: Methodology
steps.instruction: Fig. 2 enlists the logical flow of methodology adopted for sentiment classification. The steps involved in sentiment analysis are covered in detail in subsequent sections.Fig. 2Logical flow of methodology.Fig 2
